domain: Wolof xalam (Senegalese griot 5-string lute; 3 standard tunings ci suuf/ci kow/ardin; fixed string→interval mapping; griot allocates each phrase to specific string-band)
specific_mechanism: Per-head pre-allocation to disjoint RoPE frequency bands enforced by L2-norm-constrained Q/K projections; token-tessitura routing.
llm_application: XALAM-FREQ: spectral-allocation attention design with 5 attention heads pre-allocated to disjoint RoPE frequency bands [f_1...f_5]. Each head's Q/K projection has an L2-norm penalty constraining its energy to lie in the assigned band only. A routing layer assigns each query token to the band whose central frequency matches the token's 'tessitura' (estimated from a small classifier on token embedding norm). Differs from Frequency Bands in RoPE ICLR 2026 (observation only, no per-head allocation), Local Spectral Attention 2302.05693 (speech-only), Spectral Scaling Laws (analysis only) by combining (a) PER-HEAD pre-allocation to disjoint bands, (b) L2-norm Q/K constraint, (c) token-tessitura routing.
novelty_claim: Frequency Bands in RoPE + Local Spectral Attention + Spectral Scaling Laws cover band analysis + per-band attention. XALAM-FREQ recombines per-head + routing. Recombination of existing components.
content_words: ci suuf ci kow ardin tunings
